rule remsec_packer_A
{
	meta:
		copyright = "Symantec"

	strings:
		$code = {
69 ( C? | D? | E? | F? ) AB 00 00 00
( 81 | 41 81 ) C? CD 2B 00 00
( F7 | 41 
F7 ) E?
( C1 | 41 C1 ) E? 0D
( 69 | 45 69 ) ( C? | D? | E? | F? ) 85 CF 00 00
( 29 | 41 29 | 44 29 | 45 29 | 2B | 41 2B | 44 2B | 45 2B )
}

	condition:

}
